planner.brief_note: KIT-0053 (one door, ADR-0027 P3, transformation 4/6 — largest task) specced, evaluated (decomposition accepted; matrix-to-YAML declined, third appearance), promoted; worktree provisioned. Key invariants in handoff: shim->door->engine call graph (no loops), engine stays the record's only writer, preset stub seam for P7, removal task files WITH the shims. 2-PR split pre-approved. After P3: downstream checkpoint opens + P5+P7. Arc-end reminder standing: rm -rf allowlist after P6.
